name: Spark Cash Plus for Business
perks: Unlimited 2% cash back on every purchase
5% on hotels and rental cars booked via Capital One Travel
$1,200 cash bonus: $500 after $5,000 in first 3 months plus $700 after $50,000 in first 6 months
Annual fee refunded if you spend $150,000 or more
No preset spending limit (charge card, not a revolving credit card)
Year-end itemized reports for tax time
drawbacks: Charge card - balance must be paid in full each month
$30,000 total spend required to unlock both bonus tiers
High spend thresholds for signup bonus
